scope.description: New VENDOR contact type for light-rental vendors. GafferProjectMember reused for vendor associations. New «Аренда света» section on project detail page with multi-vendor support. Server-side debt aggregates split into team-only and vendor-only. Migration script for legacy roleLabel='Рентал' contacts.
commits: d38669a — feat(gaffer): picker на /gaffer/contacts/new — Заказчик / Осветитель / Рентал
0b0c577 — feat(gaffer): add VENDOR contact type for light rental vendors
60a57e1 — fix(gaffer): split team/vendor debt aggregates + migration safety
scope.backend_changes: new VENDOR enum value, split-by-type aggregates in computeProjectDebts, cross-tenant test, migration script
scope.frontend_changes: Аренда света section on project detail, vendor tab on contacts, mobile grid (2×2 <md, 4 ≥md)

high_findings: Double-count: teamPlanTotal/teamPaidTotal/teamRemaining summed across TEAM_MEMBER+VENDOR, «Должен я» included vendor debt (product+technical)
grid-cols-4 at 390px iPhone clipped «Должен ренталу» label (product)
Migration LIKE '%ental%' over-matches Latin words (dental, Oriental) (technical)
Migration backup path resolved incorrectly — silently skipped, destructive UPDATE ran without backup (technical)

medium_deferred: Migration still global-across-tenants in single UPDATE — acceptable for one-off operator-run script, could add --tenant filter
low_deferred: Top tile labels diverge from original spec («Сумма», «Должны мне» vs «Доход за проект», «Получено») — pre-existing, unchanged by this sprint
Strict team-type filter assumes server always returns contact.type — safe today, no optimistic adds exist
Orphan OUT-payments with null memberId fall into teamPaidTotal as backward-compat — documented trade-off
Legacy members with unexpected contact.type silently dropped from both plan totals — enum-level non-null makes this unreachable today
contact?.type typed as plain string instead of GafferContactType enum — 30s tightening opportunity

verification.tests: PASS (gaffer-projects.test.ts: 11/11 in isolation; full gaffer suite: 166/166 with --no-file-parallelism)
verification.cross_tenant_attack_test: added for VENDOR on addMember endpoint
